```{r, echo=FALSE, results="hide"}
repeat {
  a <- sample(2:6,1); y <- runif(1,0.1*a^2,0.9*a^2)
  ans <- sqrt(y)/a
  vals <- round(c(ans,y/a^2,2*sqrt(y)/a,1-ans,1/(2*a*sqrt(y))),4)
  if (length(unique(vals)) == 5L) break
}
opts <- sprintf("$%.4f$",vals)
```

Question
========
Se $X\sim U(-`r a`,`r a`)$ e $Y=X^2$, qual é $F_Y(`r sprintf("%.3f",y)`)$?

Answerlist
----------
* `r opts[1]`
* `r opts[2]`
* `r opts[3]`
* `r opts[4]`
* `r opts[5]`

Solution
========
Para $0<y<a^2$,
$$F_Y(y)=P(-\sqrt y\leq X\leq\sqrt y)
=\frac{2\sqrt y}{2a}=\frac{\sqrt y}{a}.$$
No ponto indicado, o valor é `r sprintf("%.4f",ans)`.

Meta-information
================
exname: Cap1S7Q7_transformacao_nao_monotona
extype: schoice
exsolution: 10000
exshuffle: TRUE
